title: ephemerantha kelsallii
intro: Ephemerantha kelsallii, also known as the Kelsall's Orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid found in tropical forests, characterized by its small white flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Ephemerantha kelsallii include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Ephemerantha kelsallii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
